repositories manager and task runner

Usage:
  mani [command]

Available Commands:
  check       Validate config
  completion  Generate completion script
  describe    Describe projects and tasks
  edit        Open up mani config file
  exec        Execute arbitrary commands
  gen         Generate man page
  help        Help about any command
  init        Initialize a mani repository
  list        List projects, tasks and tags
  run         Run tasks
  sync        Clone repositories and update .gitignore
  tui         TUI

Flags:
      --color                enable color (default true)
  -c, --config string        specify config
  -h, --help                 help for mani
  -u, --user-config string   specify user config
  -v, --version              version for mani

Use "mani [command] --help" for more information about a command.

Documentation: https://manicli.com
Issues:        https://github.com/alajmo/mani/issues
